blended.narrative: Killington is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 50°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Sunday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
